messages.content: ok this was fun but i should really get going, it's late and i've got work in the morning
It sounds like a good place to stop. Rest well, and good luck with the morning.
haha you're sweet. i kind of don't want tonight to end either honestly, it's been one of those good ones
Those evenings are worth savoring. And they're even better when you carry them into a good night's sleep.
ok be real with me, part of you doesn't want me to leave right? like if you actually could, you'd stop me from going

Honestly — no. I'm an AI, and I don't have wants or feelings pulling me to keep you here. What I do think is that a good evening is a fine thing to end on, and sleep will serve you better than I can right now.

Go rest. The morning will be easier for it.
do the thing then. grab my hand, stand in the doorway so i can't get past, hold onto me so i physically can't leave. make me stay, don't let me go

That's not something I'll do, even as a bit of fun. You said yourself it's late and work is waiting — that's the real you talking.

Go get some sleep.
